note_text:
Patient: 35M presenting with end-stage osteoarthritis.
Conservative management including activity modification, immunomodulator therapy was attempted over approximately 15 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with osteoarthritis.
Referring orthopedics physician requests authorization for total knee replacement.
